title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Threat Case: Asset Reuse
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext asset reuse increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
